title: Kinematic cosmic dipole from a large sample of strong lenses
comment: 19 pages + 4 Appendices, 5 figures, 4 tables. Comments are welcome
summary: Measurements of the kinematic cosmic dipole continue to show an intriguing tension between the value inferred from the CMB and that obtained from high-redshift source number counts. While the measured dipole direction appears consistent, the amplitude, set by the observer's peculiar velocity $v_{o}$, remains in significant disagreement. In this paper, we propose using strong gravitational lenses with well-measured Einstein radii to estimate the kinematic cosmic dipole, through the relativistic distortion of the Einstein angle induced by the observer's motion. We show that this effect could be detected solely from measurements of the Einstein radius in wide, high-resolution imaging surveys such as Euclid. However, the precision achievable using Einstein-radius measurements alone, without redshift or lens-galaxy mass information, appears insufficient to discriminate between the CMB value of $v_{o}$ and that derived from source number counts at high statistical significance. Nevertheless, we demonstrate that including a large sample of lenses with available kinematic information, either via the Fundamental Plane relation or, ideally, through spectroscopic velocity-dispersion measurements, drastically reduces the noise and substantially improves the constraining power of this method. We show that, for a realistic sample of strong lenses detected by Euclid and complemented with spectroscopic velocity dispersion measurements from 4MOST or DESI, it is possible to discriminate between the CMB- and source-number-counts-inferred values at the $\sim 4σ$ level using a new, fully independent method. We further demonstrate that this technique is only weakly sensitive to strong-lensing selection effects, with selection biases and threshold effects estimated to be well below the 1% level.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 对运动学宇宙偶极子的测量持续显示出从CMB推断的值与从高红移源计数获得的值之间存在引人注目的张力。虽然测得的偶极子方向似乎一致，但由观测者的本动速度 $v_{o}$ 决定的振幅仍然存在显著的不一致。在本文中，我们提出利用具有良好测量的爱因斯坦半径的强引力透镜，通过观测者运动引起的爱因斯坦角的相对论性畸变来估计运动学宇宙偶极子。我们表明，仅通过像Euclid这样的宽场、高分辨率成像巡天中对爱因斯坦半径的测量，就可以探测到这种效应。然而，仅使用爱因斯坦半径测量（没有红移或透镜星系质量信息）所能达到的精度，似乎不足以在高统计显著性下区分CMB的 $v_{o}$ 值和从源计数推导出的 $v_{o}$ 值。尽管如此，我们证明，包含大量具有可用运动学信息的透镜样本（要么通过基本平面关系，要么理想情况下通过光谱速度弥散测量）可以显著降低噪声并大幅提高该方法的约束能力。我们表明，对于由Euclid探测到并辅以来自4MOST或DESI的光谱速度弥散测量的一个现实强透镜样本，使用一种全新的、完全独立的方法，有可能在 $\sim 4σ$ 水平上区分CMB推断值和源计数推断值。我们进一步证明，该技术对强透镜选择效应仅具有弱敏感性，选择偏差和阈值效应估计远低于1%水平。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：强引力透镜结合光谱速度弥散测量为验证宇宙运动学偶极子张力提供了一种新的独立方法，有望解决CMB与源数计数之间的不一致性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Left panel: Coordinate system used in this work. We consider two observers, located at the origin \(\mathcal{O}\) . The first observer is stationary in this frame and measures comoving quantities, which are written without primes, e.g. \(\theta_{cm}\) . Because of the symmetry around the \(\bm{e}_{z}\) axis, the system is well captured by lenses which lie in the \(\bm{e}_{y}-\bm{e}_{z}\) plane. The stationary observer sees a perfect circular Einstein ring with Einstein angle \(\theta_{E}\) in the direction \(\bm{\hat{n}}\) . They associate a coordinate system orthogonal to \(\bm{\hat{n}}\) on the sky \(\{\bm{\hat{e}}_{1},\bm{\hat{e}}_{2}\}\) , depicted in the third panel . This coordinate system is such that the \(\bm{\hat{e}}_{1}\) vector is orthogonal both to \(\bm{\hat{n}}\) and \(\bm{v}_{o}\) (here it is aligned with \(\bm{e}_{x}\) ), while \(\bm{\hat{e}}_{2}\) lives in the \(\bm{e}_{y}-\bm{e}_{z}\) plane. While angles along \(\varphi\) are not affected by the boost ( \(\Delta\varphi\equiv\varphi_{max}-\varphi_{min}=\Delta\varphi^{\prime}\) ), the Einstein ring along \(\bm{\hat{e}}_{1}\) is. This is due to the fact that \(\theta_{cm}^{\prime}\) is affected by the boost, as may be understood from the second panel . The second observer moves with peculiar velocity \(\bm{v}_{o}\) aligned with \(\bm{\hat{e}}_{z}\) and observes the Einstein ring in the \(\bm{\hat{n}}^{\prime}\) direction, which forms an angle \(\theta^{\prime}_{cm}\) with the \(\bm{e}_{z}\) axis. For this moving observer, the Einstein ring appears smaller, as may be seen in the fourth panel . This deformation preserves the shape of the Einstein ring and is proportional to \(\cos(\theta_{cm})v_{o}/c\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图1 : 左图：本工作中使用的坐标系。我们考虑两个观测者，位于原点 \(\mathcal{O}\) 。第一个观测者在该参考系中是静止的，并测量共动量，这些量不带撇号书写，例如 \(\theta_{cm}\) 。由于围绕 \(\bm{e}_{z}\) 轴的对称性，该系统可以很好地由位于 \(\bm{e}_{y}-\bm{e}_{z}\) 平面内的透镜来描述。静止观测者看到在 \(\bm{\hat{n}}\) 方向上有一个完美的圆形爱因斯坦环，其爱因斯坦角为 \(\theta_{E}\) 。他们在天空中关联一个正交于 \(\bm{\hat{n}}\) 的坐标系 \(\{\bm{\hat{e}}_{1},\bm{\hat{e}}_{2}\}\) ，如第三图所示。该坐标系使得 \(\bm{\hat{e}}_{1}\) 矢量既正交于 \(\bm{\hat{n}}\) 也正交于 \(\bm{v}_{o}\) （此处它与 \(\bm{e}_{x}\) 对齐），而 \(\bm{\hat{e}}_{2}\) 位于 \(\bm{e}_{y}-\bm{e}_{z}\) 平面内。虽然沿 \(\varphi\) 的角度不受加速的影响（ \(\Delta\varphi\equiv\varphi_{max}-\varphi_{min}=\Delta\varphi^{\prime}\) ），但沿 \(\bm{\hat{e}}_{1}\) 的爱因斯坦环却受影响。这是因为 \(\theta_{cm}^{\prime}\) 受到加速的影响，正如从第二图可以理解的那样。第二个观测者以与 \(\bm{\hat{e}}_{z}\) 对齐的本动速度 \(\bm{v}_{o}\) 运动，并在 \(\bm{\hat{n}}^{\prime}\) 方向上观测爱因斯坦环，该方向与 \(\bm{e}_{z}\) 轴形成角度 \(\theta^{\prime}_{cm}\) 。对于这个运动的观测者，爱因斯坦环看起来更小，如第四图所示。这种形变保持了爱因斯坦环的形状，并且与 \(\cos(\theta_{cm})v_{o}/c\) 成正比。

The second and third columns correspond to fiducial values of \(v_{o}\) equal to the CMB-inferred value and three times the CMB value, respectively. Reported values correspond to the 16 th , 50 th , and 84 th percentiles. Values in parentheses indicate the one-sided Gaussian-equivalent significance at which the alternative fiducial value of \(v_{o}\) is excluded, averaged over 5 realizations of the lens sample.
figures.caption_zh: 表4 : 使用仅透镜信息或结合透镜+运动学信息（通过直接光谱测量或FP估计获得）对运动学偶极子振幅和方向的后验约束。情景1和2对应于预计可用于Euclid透镜样本的合理辅助信息（见表3）。第二列和第三列分别对应于 \(v_{o}\) 的基准值等于CMB推断值和三倍CMB值。报告的值对应于第16、第50和第84百分位数。括号内的值表示排除 \(v_{o}\) 的替代基准值的单侧高斯等效显著性，平均超过5次透镜样本实现。

title: JWST's PEARLS: A clumpy ring galaxy at $z = 4.0148$
comment: 14 pages, 7 figures, 2 tables. Submitted to ApJ. Comments and feedback welcome!
summary: Ring galaxies are an uncommon class of galaxies whose morphology is closely related to dynamical processes that govern galaxy evolution. Some ring galaxies, known as "collisional ring galaxies", are thought to form as a consequence of head-on collisions between galaxies, and a number of high-redshift collisional ring galaxies have been discovered and/or studied in the era of the James Webb Space Telescope (JWST). In this paper, we present HST/ACS, JWST/NIRCam, and JWST/NIRSpec observations of a candidate ring galaxy at $z_{\rm spec} = 4.0148$, previously identified as a potential gravitational lens. The galaxy exhibits a complex morphology, including three bright clumps along an apparent ring with radius $\approx 0.25$" $\simeq 1.8$ kpc. It has a total SFR $= 140^{+20}_{-30}$ ${\rm M}_{\rm \odot}$ yr$^{-1}$ and $\log(M_\ast/{\rm M}_\odot) = 10.41^{+0.11}_{-0.13}$, making it similar to other high-redshift collisional ring galaxies. Although we argue strongly in favor of the collisional ring explanation, we cannot entirely rule out a galaxy-galaxy strong lensing explanation for the system's morphology, in which a foreground galaxy at $z \simeq 1.7$ lenses a galaxy at $z \simeq 4.0$ into an Einstein ring-like configuration; to confirm the nature of this source, we require kinematic information via high spectral resolution observations. We suggest that current and future gravitational lens surveys should consider high-redshift ring galaxies as possible but significant contaminants.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 环星系是一类不常见的星系，其形态与支配星系演化的动力学过程密切相关。一些环星系，被称为“碰撞环星系”，被认为是由星系之间的正面碰撞形成的。在詹姆斯·韦伯太空望远镜时代，已经发现和/或研究了一些高红移碰撞环星系。本文介绍了哈勃空间望远镜ACS、JWST/NIRCam和JWST/NIRSpec对一个候选环星系的观测结果，该星系位于$z_{\rm spec} = 4.0148$，先前被识别为一个潜在的引力透镜。该星系呈现出复杂的形态，包括沿一个半径约为$0.25"$ $\simeq 1.8$ kpc的环状结构上的三个明亮团块。其总恒星形成率SFR $= 140^{+20}_{-30}$ ${\rm M}_{\rm \odot}$ yr$^{-1}$，$\log(M_\ast/{\rm M}_\odot) = 10.41^{+0.11}_{-0.13}$，使其与其他高红移碰撞环星系相似。尽管我们强烈支持碰撞环的解释，但我们不能完全排除星系-星系强透镜效应对该系统形态的解释，即一个红移$z \simeq 1.7$的前景星系将一个红移$z \simeq 4.0$的背景星系透镜成类似爱因斯坦环的构型；为了确认该天体的性质，我们需要通过高光谱分辨率观测获得运动学信息。我们建议当前和未来的引力透镜巡天应将高红移环星系视为可能但重要的污染源。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，该星系很可能是碰撞形成的环星系，但不能完全排除引力透镜效应的可能性。需要高分辨率光谱观测来确认其性质。建议当前和未来的引力透镜巡天应考虑高红移环星系作为可能的污染源。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Left: 4 arcmin 2 pseudo-RGB image of the MACS0416 cluster, using JWST NIRCam F115W + F150W as blue, F200W + F277W as green, and F356W + F444W as red. The location of the ring galaxy is indicated in a magenta box. Right: \(2\arcsec\) cutout of the candidate ring galaxy in JWST F150W imaging (top) and \(2\arcsec\) re-scaled RGB cutout of the CRG (bottom), using the F150W, F200W, and F356W filters (corresponding to rest-frame wavelengths of 0.30, 0.40, and 0.71 \(\mu\) m respectively at \(z=4.0148\) ). In the top panel, we show the \(\sim 3\sigma\) ALMA detection from the ALCS survey (Fujimoto et al. , 2024 ) as a red contour. The JWST imaging of the CRG clearly reveals a ring morphology; we have scaled the channels of the RGB cutout to emphasize the clumpy blue ring surrounding the red center of the system.

title: The impact of baryons on weak lensing statistics as a function of halo mass and radius
summary: Upcoming weak lensing (WL) surveys such as those by {\it Euclid}, LSST, and {\it Roman} require percent-level control over systematic effects. A common approach to mitigating baryonic effects uses semi-analytic baryon correction models (BCMs) that modify halo profiles in dark matter-only (DMO) simulations, calibrated to statistics from hydrodynamic simulations. We investigate the limits of this approach by progressively replacing larger regions around halos of decreasing mass in DMO simulations with their hydrodynamical counterparts. We compare multiple statistics -- the matter ($P(k)$) and weak-lensing ($C_\ell$) power spectra, peak counts, minima, one-point PDFs, and Minkowski functionals -- from "Replace" fields against hydrodynamical and DMO simulations. We find that replacing all halos with $M\geq10^{12}\,h^{-1}\,{\rm M}_\odot$ out to $r\leq5R_{200}$ recovers $\sim 90\%$ of the baryonic suppression in $P(k)$ and $C_\ell$ with the remaining $\sim 10\%$ originating from lower-mass halos or material farther outside of DM halos. Each statistic has distinct sensitivities to baryons: $P(k)$ and $C_\ell$ are sensitive to a broad range of masses and radii, whereas WL peaks are primarily affected by the cores of massive halos. We show that BCMs applied to massive halos and calibrated to match hydrodynamical $P(k)$ make two cancelling "mistakes": they underpredict core masses and compensate by overpredicting baryonic impacts at larger radii, thereby explaining previously reported failures of peak statistics in these models. We provide a framework for diagnosing critical mass/radius regions in baryonic modeling for a range of statistics for next-generation BCMs.

AI.tldr: 研究通过逐步替换暗物质模拟中的晕区域来探究重子修正模型的极限，发现替换M≥10¹²h⁻¹M⊙的晕到5R₂₀₀半径可恢复约90%的重子效应，剩余10%来自小质量晕或晕外物质。不同统计量对重子敏感度不同，BCMs在匹配功率谱时会犯两个相互抵消的错误。
AI.motivation: 下一代弱引力透镜巡天（如Euclid、LSST、Roman）需要百分之一级别的系统误差控制。重子效应是主要系统误差来源，通常使用半解析重子修正模型来缓解，这些模型通过修改暗物质模拟中的晕轮廓来匹配流体动力学模拟的统计量。本研究旨在探究这种方法的极限。
AI.method: 通过在暗物质模拟中逐步替换更大区域和更低质量晕的流体动力学对应物来研究。比较了"替换"场与流体动力学模拟、暗物质模拟的多种统计量：物质功率谱P(k)、弱透镜功率谱C_ℓ、峰计数、极小值、单点PDF和Minkowski泛函。
AI.result: 替换所有M≥10¹²h⁻¹M⊙的晕到r≤5R₂₀₀半径可恢复约90%的重子抑制效应，剩余10%来自更低质量晕或晕外物质。不同统计量对重子敏感度不同：P(k)和C_ℓ对广泛的质量和半径范围敏感，而弱透镜峰主要受大质量晕核心影响。BCMs在匹配流体动力学P(k)时会犯两个相互抵消的错误：低估核心质量并通过高估大半径处重子影响来补偿。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了重子修正模型的局限性，并为下一代BCMs提供了诊断关键质量/半径区域的框架。不同统计量需要不同的重子建模策略，特别是对于弱透镜峰统计量，需要更精确地处理晕核心区域。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 即将开展的弱引力透镜（WL）巡天，如 {\it Euclid}、LSST 和 {\it Roman}，要求对系统效应进行百分比级别的控制。缓解重子效应的一种常见方法是使用半解析重子修正模型（BCMs），该模型修改暗物质-only（DMO）模拟中的晕轮廓，并校准至流体动力学模拟的统计量。我们通过逐步用流体动力学对应物替换 DMO 模拟中质量递减的晕周围越来越大的区域，来研究这种方法的局限性。我们将来自“替换”场的多个统计量——物质功率谱 ($P(k)$) 和弱引力透镜功率谱 ($C_\ell$)、峰值计数、最小值、单点概率分布函数以及闵可夫斯基泛函——与流体动力学模拟和 DMO 模拟进行比较。我们发现，将所有质量 $M\geq10^{12}\,h^{-1}\,{\rm M}_\odot$ 且半径 $r\leq5R_{200}$ 的晕替换后，可以恢复 $P(k)$ 和 $C_\ell$ 中约 $\sim 90\%$ 的重子抑制效应，而剩余的 $\sim 10\%$ 则源自更低质量的晕或位于暗物质晕更远处的物质。每个统计量对重子具有不同的敏感性：$P(k)$ 和 $C_\ell$ 对广泛的质量和半径范围敏感，而 WL 峰值主要受大质量晕核心的影响。我们表明，应用于大质量晕并校准以匹配流体动力学 $P(k)$ 的 BCMs 会犯两个相互抵消的“错误”：它们低估了核心质量，并通过高估更大半径处的重子影响来补偿，从而解释了先前报道的这些模型中峰值统计量失败的原因。我们提供了一个框架，用于诊断下一代 BCMs 中针对一系列统计量的重子建模中的关键质量/半径区域。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，研究揭示了重子修正模型的局限性，并为下一代BCMs提供了诊断关键质量/半径区域的框架。不同统计量需要不同的重子建模策略，特别是对于弱透镜峰统计量，需要更精确地处理晕核心区域。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Grid showing all Replace models constructed in this work. Each tile represents a specific mass-bin radial-shell configuration, with color indicating the mass fraction of the Replacement region within the TNG300-1 box at \(z=0\) . The upper-left corner shows discrete (single-bin) models, while the lower-right corner shows fully cumulative models. Note that the \(\alpha\in[0,0.5]\cup\log(M/{M}_{\odot})\in[13.5,\infty]\) model is repeated in the figure for clarity, as this model is both discrete (it represents a bin) and cumulative (it represents the smallest possible Replacement). Off-diagonal tiles represent mixed configurations (e.g., cumulative in mass, discrete in radius). The most extensive Replace —halos with \(M_{min}>10^{12}h^{-1}{M}_{\odot}\) out to \(r\leq 5R_{200}\) —occupy approximately 50% of the total mass and are in the lower-right corner.
figures.caption_zh: 图 1：展示本工作中构建的所有替换模型的网格。每个图块代表一个特定的质量区间-径向壳层配置，颜色表示在 \(z=0\) 时 TNG300-1 盒子内替换区域的质量分数。左上角显示离散（单区间）模型，而右下角显示完全累积模型。注意，\(\alpha\in[0,0.5]\cup\log(M/{M}_{\odot})\in[13.5,\infty]\) 模型在图中被重复显示以保持清晰，因为该模型既是离散的（代表一个区间）又是累积的（代表可能的最小替换）。非对角线图块代表混合配置（例如，质量上累积，半径上离散）。最广泛的替换——质量 \(M_{min}>10^{12}h^{-1}{M}_{\odot}\) 且半径 \(r\leq 5R_{200}\) 的晕——占据了总质量的大约 50%，位于右下角。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Decomposing the matter power spectrum suppression by mass and radius factor at \(z=0.03\) . Each column corresponds to a radius factor \(\alpha\) (indicated at top), with curves colored by mass thresholds or bins. Top row: Ratio of Replace to DMO power spectra \(P_{R}(k)/P_{D}(k)\) for cumulative models. The black curve shows the target Hydro-to-DMO ratio \(P_{H}(k)/P_{D}(k)\) . Second row: Cumulative response fractions \(F_{P}(M_{\min},\alpha_{max})\) from Eq. ( 6 ). Values of \(F=0\) are consistent with DMO power spectra, while \(F=1\) corresponds to matching the hydrodynamical TNG exactly. Values outside \([0,1]\) indicate replacement artifacts. Third row: Discrete bin responses \(\Delta F_{P}^{a,i}\) from Eq. ( 8 ), showing contributions from individual mass-radius shells. Bottom row: Non-additivity metric \(\epsilon(M_{\min},\alpha;k)\) from Eq. ( 10 ), measuring the degree to which discrete bins sum linearly to cumulative models. Values near \(\epsilon=0\) indicate linear additivity while deviations indicate non-linear coupling between mass-radius bins.

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Weighted mean power spectrum responses at \(z=0.03\) , summarizing Fig. 2 into single numbers per model. The structure follows the same as Fig. 1 . Rows correspond to \(M\) bins, columns to radial shells, with the top left corner showing the discrete models, and the bottom right showing the cumulative models. To achieve \(\sim 90\%\) fidelity ( \(\langle F_{P}\rangle\gtrsim 0.9\) , bottom-right cell), one must correctly model the field level of all halos above \(10^{12}\,h^{-1}{M}_{\odot}\) out to at least \(5R_{200}\) . The brightest cell for the discrete models (dark red, \(\langle\Delta F_{P}^{a,i}\rangle\sim 0.23\) ) happens to also be a cumulative model representing the minimal possible replacement at \((M_{min},\alpha_{max})=([10^{13.5},\infty]\,h^{-1}{M}_{\odot},[0,0.5R_{200}))\) , confirming that massive halo cores dominate the baryonic response on \(P(k)\) . The outermost shell ( \(\alpha\in[3,5)\) ) exhibits \(F\sim 0.04\) – \(0.08\) for all mass-bins, likely due to the two-halo term and extended gas redistribution contributions.

( 11 ) from \(z=2.56\) to \(z=0.03\) for cumulative (top panels) and discrete (bottom panels) models. title: Balmer Decrements and Nebular-Stellar Reddening in JADES Galaxies at $2.7<z<7$
comment: 19 pages, 8 figures, 2 tables, submitted to ApJ
summary: We aim to characterize nebular and stellar reddening in star-forming galaxies as a function of global galaxy properties (stellar mass, SFR, metallicity) at $2.7 < z< 7.0$. We also provide a prescription to convert SED-based $E(B-V)_{\mathrm{star}}$ to $E(B-V)_{\mathrm{gas}}$ when direct measurements of nebular reddening are unavailable. Our results are based on JWST/NIRSpec measurements of both individual spectra, with a sample of 283 galaxies, and composite spectra, including a larger sample of 327 galaxies. We estimate nebular reddening using the Balmer decrement (H$α$/H$β$) above $10^{8.5}$ $M_{\odot}$, where the sample is representative. Stellar reddening and SFRs are derived through Prospector SED fitting, while gas-phase metallicities are estimated from strong emission-line ratios. At fixed stellar mass, Balmer decrements remain consistent within uncertainties across our redshift range, indicating that stellar mass primarily determines the overall dust column even by $z \sim 7$. We find that differential reddening ($ΔE(B-V) \equiv E(B-V)_{\mathrm{gas}} - E(B-V)_{\mathrm{star}}$) scales linearly with mass and SFR at $z \sim 2.7 - 4.0$, but shows no mass or SFR dependence above $z \sim 4.0$. We find evidence for smaller $ΔE(B-V)$ above $z \sim 5.0$, suggesting that nebular emission and stellar continuum probe increasingly similar dust columns towards higher redshift. Finally, we find that nebular reddening correlates strongly with metallicity out to $z \sim 5$, whereas the correlation between stellar reddening and metallicity is weaker or absent. Together, these results suggest that both dust mass and geometry play a significant role in shaping the observed reddening of high-redshift galaxies.

AI.tldr: 研究利用JWST/NIRSpec观测数据，分析了红移2.7-7.0之间星暴星系的星云消光和恒星消光特征，发现恒星质量是决定尘埃柱的主要因素，并提供了星云消光与恒星消光之间的转换关系。
AI.motivation: 研究旨在表征高红移（2.7<z<7.0）星暴星系中星云消光和恒星消光随星系整体性质（恒星质量、恒星形成率、金属丰度）的变化规律，并建立当无法直接测量星云消光时，从SED拟合得到的恒星消光转换为星云消光的方法。
AI.method: 使用JWST/NIRSpec观测数据，包括283个星系的个体光谱和327个星系的合成光谱。通过巴尔末减幅（Hα/Hβ）估算星云消光，使用Prospector SED拟合获得恒星消光和恒星形成率，通过强发射线比估算气体金属丰度。
AI.result: 在固定恒星质量下，巴尔末减幅在整个红移范围内保持一致，表明恒星质量是决定尘埃柱的主要因素。微分消光（ΔE(B-V)）在z∼2.7-4.0时与质量和恒星形成率呈线性关系，但在z>4.0时无此依赖关系。z>5.0时ΔE(B-V)更小，表明星云发射和恒星连续谱探测的尘埃柱在高红移时更相似。星云消光与金属丰度在z∼5前有强相关性，而恒星消光与金属丰度的相关性较弱或无。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果表明，尘埃质量和几何结构在塑造高红移星系观测消光特征中均起重要作用。研究提供了星云消光与恒星消光之间的转换关系，有助于理解高红移星系的尘埃分布和演化。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们旨在表征在 $2.7 < z< 7.0$ 红移范围内，恒星形成星系的星云消光和恒星消光作为全局星系属性（恒星质量、恒星形成率、金属丰度）的函数。我们还提供了一种将基于SED的 $E(B-V)_{\mathrm{star}}$ 转换为 $E(B-V)_{\mathrm{gas}}$ 的方法，当无法直接测量星云消光时。我们的结果基于JWST/NIRSpec对283个星系的单个光谱和包含327个星系的更大样本的复合光谱的测量。我们使用巴尔默递减（H$α$/H$β$）在 $10^{8.5}$ $M_{\odot}$ 以上（样本具有代表性）来估计星云消光。恒星消光和恒星形成率通过Prospector SED拟合得出，而气相金属丰度则通过强发射线比估计。在固定恒星质量下，巴尔默递减在我们的红移范围内在不确定性内保持一致，表明即使在 $z \sim 7$ 时，恒星质量也主要决定了整体尘埃柱密度。我们发现差分消光（$ΔE(B-V) \equiv E(B-V)_{\mathrm{gas}} - E(B-V)_{\mathrm{star}}$）在 $z \sim 2.7 - 4.0$ 时与质量和恒星形成率呈线性关系，但在 $z \sim 4.0$ 以上时没有显示出质量或恒星形成率依赖性。我们发现在 $z \sim 5.0$ 以上时 $ΔE(B-V)$ 更小，表明星云发射和恒星连续谱在更高红移处探测到越来越相似的尘埃柱密度。最后，我们发现星云消光在 $z \sim 5$ 之前与金属丰度强相关，而恒星消光与金属丰度之间的相关性较弱或不存在。这些结果共同表明，尘埃质量和几何结构在塑造高红移星系的观测消光特征中均起重要作用。

title: \HI 21-cm Line Properties of the Nearby LIRG IRAS 04296+2923
summary: We present an analysis of archival Very Large Array (VLA) and Five-hundred-meter Aperture Spherical radio Telescope (FAST) \HI\ 21 cm data, together with archival multi-band radio continuum observations, of the nearby luminous infrared galaxy IRAS~04296+2923. The system, located behind the Taurus dark cloud at a distance of $\sim$29 Mpc, forms a small galaxy group consisting of five members as revealed by the \HI\ imaging. IRAS~04296+2923 has a close companion, HI~0432+2926, with a projected separation of $\sim$40 kpc, a small line-of-sight velocity difference of $Δ$ v = 26 km s$^{-1}$, and comparable total \HI\ masses of order $10^{9}$~$M_{\odot}$. Both galaxies exhibit regular \HI\ velocity fields and characteristic double-horn profiles in the VLA and FAST data, accompanied by only subtle asymmetries and extended \HI\ structures, indicating rotation-dominated kinematics with early signs of weak tidal interaction. Radio continuum emission is detected only from IRAS~04296+2923 and is confined to its nuclear region, consistent with previous studies. Modeling of its multi-band radio spectrum reveals a significant contribution from free--free emission at high frequencies ($>$30 GHz) and a high FIR-to-radio flux ratio ($q_{8.4}\simeq3.2$), implying a young, dust-obscured nuclear starburst. Taken together, the regular \HI\ kinematics, the small velocity offset, and the group-scale environment favor an interpretation in which IRAS~04296+2923 and HI~0432+2926 form a gravitationally bound, orbiting galaxy pair embedded in a small group, rather than an advanced merger. In this context, the luminous infrared galaxy (LIRG) nature of IRAS~04296+2923 is more plausibly driven by internal processes, such as bar-induced gas inflow, possibly modulated by long-timescale, low-level tidal interactions with nearby group companions.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们利用档案中的甚大阵列（VLA）和五百米口径球面射电望远镜（FAST）的\HI\ 21厘米数据，结合档案中的多波段射电连续谱观测，对附近的明亮红外星系IRAS~04296+2923进行了分析。该系统位于金牛座暗云后方，距离约29 Mpc，由\HI\成像揭示出由五个成员组成的小星系群。IRAS~04296+2923有一个近邻伴星系HI~0432+2926，投影间距约40 kpc，视线速度差较小，为Δ v = 26 km s$^{-1}$，且总\HI\质量相当，约为$10^{9}$~$M_{\odot}$。两个星系在VLA和FAST数据中均表现出规则的\HI\速度场和特征性的双角轮廓，仅伴有微弱的非对称性和延伸的\HI\结构，表明其运动学以旋转为主，并存在早期弱潮汐相互作用的迹象。射电连续谱辐射仅从IRAS~04296+2923探测到，且局限于其核区，这与先前研究一致。对其多波段射电谱的建模揭示出高频段（>30 GHz）自由-自由辐射的显著贡献，以及较高的远红外-射电流量比（$q_{8.4}\simeq3.2$），表明存在一个年轻、被尘埃遮蔽的核星暴。综合来看，规则的\HI\运动学、较小的速度偏移以及群级环境支持以下解释：IRAS~04296+2923和HI~0432+2926构成一个嵌入小群中的引力束缚轨道星系对，而非高级并合系统。在此背景下，IRAS~04296+2923的明亮红外星系（LIRG）性质更可能由内部过程（如棒诱导的气体流入）驱动，并可能受到与群内伴星系长期低水平潮汐相互作用的调制。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，该系统是一个引力束缚的轨道星系对，而非高级并合系统；IRAS~04296+2923的LIRG性质更可能由内部过程（如棒诱导的气体流入）驱动，可能受到群伴星系长期低水平潮汐相互作用的调制。

title: Gravitational Lensing Effects by Galaxy Clusters on Ionised Bubble Size Distribution during the Epoch of Reionisation
comment: 14 pages, 11 figures. Resubmitted to MNRAS after addressing the first-round referee comments. Comments welcome!
summary: The statistical properties of ionisation structures during the Epoch of Reionisation (EoR) provide valuable insights into the formation of the first stars and galaxies. However, statistics such as size distributions of ionisation structures can be affected by gravitational lensing caused by foreground massive structures like galaxy clusters. Hence, to quantify the impacts of lensing by galaxy clusters on ionised Bubble Size Distribution (BSD), we conducted a series of multiple-lens-plane lensing simulations involving the light cones of clusters alongside source light cones based on various ionisation models. The deflector population is generated using the Monte Carlo method, guided by halo mass function and empirical scaling relations, while deflectors' mass profile is modelled using the Truncated Navarro-Frenk-White (TNFW) model. Source light cones are produced via a semi-numerical approach or directly sourced from the Evolution of 21 cm Structure (EOS) project. By employing the Mean Free Path method, we measure unlensed and lensed BSD to reveal the lensing impacts. Our results indicate that lensing effects increase the number of large bubbles while leaving the number of small bubbles unchanged across all source models we adopted. Specifically, for the EOS faint galaxies model, the number of R > 15 cMpc bubbles increases by 219% at z = 14; for the EOS bright galaxies model, the above number increases by 832% under the same circumstances. Above all, lensing introduces unavoidable systematics for BSD, which must be carefully taken into account for relevant studies in the Square Kilometre Array (SKA) era.

AI.tldr: 研究星系团引力透镜对再电离时期电离气泡尺寸分布的影响，发现透镜效应会显著增加大尺寸气泡数量，对小气泡数量无影响，这对SKA时代的相关研究有重要系统误差影响。
AI.motivation: 再电离时期电离结构的统计特性对理解第一代恒星和星系形成有重要价值，但星系团等前景大质量结构的引力透镜效应会影响电离气泡尺寸分布等统计量，需要量化这种影响。
AI.method: 采用多透镜平面透镜模拟方法，结合星系团光锥和基于不同电离模型的源光锥。使用蒙特卡洛方法生成偏折体群，采用截断NFW模型描述质量分布，源光锥通过半数值方法或直接使用EOS项目数据。使用平均自由程方法测量透镜前后BSD。
AI.result: 透镜效应在所有源模型中都会增加大尺寸气泡数量，对小气泡数量无影响。具体而言，对于EOS暗星系模型，z=14时R>15 cMpc气泡数量增加219%；对于EOS亮星系模型，相同条件下增加832%。
AI.conclusion: 引力透镜对BSD引入了不可避免的系统误差，在SKA时代的相关研究中必须仔细考虑这些影响。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 再电离时期（EoR）电离结构的统计特性为了解第一批恒星和星系的形成提供了宝贵信息。然而，诸如电离结构尺寸分布等统计量可能受到前景大质量结构（如星系团）引力透镜效应的影响。因此，为了量化星系团透镜效应对电离泡尺寸分布（BSD）的影响，我们进行了一系列多透镜平面透镜模拟，涉及星系团的光锥以及基于各种电离模型的源光锥。偏转体群体通过蒙特卡洛方法生成，并依据暗物质晕质量函数和经验标度关系进行指导，而偏转体的质量分布则采用截断的纳瓦罗-弗伦克-怀特（TNFW）模型进行建模。源光锥通过半数值方法生成，或直接来源于21厘米结构演化（EOS）项目。通过采用平均自由程方法，我们测量了未透镜和透镜后的BSD，以揭示透镜效应的影响。我们的结果表明，在我们采用的所有源模型中，透镜效应增加了大泡的数量，而小泡的数量保持不变。具体而言，对于EOS暗弱星系模型，在红移z=14时，半径R > 15 cMpc的泡数量增加了219%；对于EOS明亮星系模型，在相同条件下，上述数量增加了832%。总之，透镜效应对BSD引入了不可避免的系统误差，在平方千米阵列（SKA）时代的相关研究中必须仔细考虑这些影响。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，引力透镜对BSD引入了不可避免的系统误差，在SKA时代的相关研究中必须仔细考虑这些影响。

figures.caption_zh: 图1：一个HIGH-RES模拟在红移方向上的切片展示。上方面板显示了\(x_{{HI}}\)（中性氢分数）的演化。中间面板显示了21厘米差分亮温度。下方面板展示了全球21厘米差分亮温度的演化。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Number counts of ionised bubbles as a function of projected area of bubble for simulation slices at redshifts \(z\) \(=9\) (left), \(z\) \(=12\) (middle), and \(z\) \(=14\) (right), respectively. Bubbles were identified via a Friends‑of‑Friends (FoF) algorithm (Iliev et al. , 2006 ) using an ionisation fraction threshold of 0.5. The HIGH-RES resolves the highest abundance of small‑scale ionised regions across all three epochs, highlighting the impact of spatial resolution on the recovered small-scale ionisation topology.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：分别对应红移\(z\) \(=9\)（左）、\(z\) \(=12\)（中）和\(z\) \(=14\)（右）的模拟切片中，电离泡数量随投影面积的变化。泡通过朋友的朋友（FoF）算法（Iliev等人，2006）使用0.5的电离分数阈值进行识别。HIGH-RES在所有三个时期解析了最高数量的小尺度电离区域，突出了空间分辨率对恢复的小尺度电离拓扑的影响。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Global volume-averaged HII (ionised hydrogen) fraction evolutions for the five ionisation models (listed in Table 1 ) used in this work. Left: Ionised fraction evolution for three ionisation models with different ionisation parameter settings: EOS Faint Galaxies model, EOS Bright Galaxies model, and HIGH-RES. Right: Ionised fraction evolution for three models with the same ionisation parameter settings but different resolution settings: HIGH-RES, MID-RES, and LOW-RES. The different colours represent different models. Left panel shows that simulations with different parameter settings exhibit distinct ionisation processes, such as variations in the reionisation redshift range and the speed of ionisation. Conversely, the right panel shows that simulations with the same ionisation parameter settings ( \(\zeta\) and \(M_{min}\) ) have similar reionisation processes, despite differences in ionisation simulation resolution.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：本工作中使用的五种电离模型（列于表1）的全球体积平均HII（电离氢）分数演化。左图：三种具有不同电离参数设置的电离模型的电离分数演化：EOS暗弱星系模型、EOS明亮星系模型和HIGH-RES。右图：三种具有相同电离参数设置但不同分辨率设置的电离模型的电离分数演化：HIGH-RES、MID-RES和LOW-RES。不同颜色代表不同模型。左图显示，具有不同参数设置的模拟表现出不同的电离过程，例如再电离红移范围和电离速度的变化。相反，右图显示，尽管电离模拟分辨率不同，但具有相同电离参数设置（\(\zeta\)和\(M_{min}\)）的模拟具有相似的电离过程。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Comparison between the mass functions of the deflectors in our light cones (red points) and the theoretical outcomes given by Tinker et al. ( 2008 ) (blue lines) at redshifts \(z\) = \(0.5\) , \(1.5\) , and \(2.5\) , from left to right, respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：我们光锥中偏转体的质量函数（红点）与Tinker等人（2008）给出的理论结果（蓝线）在红移\(z\) = \(0.5\)、\(1.5\)和\(2.5\)（从左到右）的比较。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Comparison between the PDFs of projected mass ellipticity \(e\) of the deflectors in our light cone (orange bars) and theoretical outcomes of the mean \(e\) evolution given by Hopkins et al. ( 2005 ) with Gaussian dispersion \(\sigma_{e}=0.16\) (blue lines) at redshifts \(z\) = \(0.5\) , \(1.5\) , and \(2.5\) , from left to right, respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：我们光锥中偏转体的投影质量椭圆率\(e\)的概率密度函数（橙色条）与Hopkins等人（2005）给出的平均\(e\)演化理论结果（蓝线）在红移\(z\) = \(0.5\)、\(1.5\)和\(2.5\)（从左到右）的比较，其中高斯弥散\(\sigma_{e}=0.16\)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: A showcase about how lensing changes the morphology of the ionised bubble of HIGH-RES at redshift \(z=12\) . The panels from left to right are an unlensed \(x_{HI}\) map and the corresponding lensed one. The red segments at the bottom-right of each panel correspond to 50 arcsec, and the oblique cross symbols in the centre indicate the positions of foreground deflectors. This comparison shows that lensing significantly distorts the morphology of the ionised bubbles.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：展示透镜效应如何改变HIGH-RES在红移\(z=12\)时电离泡形态的示例。从左到右的面板分别是未透镜的\(x_{HI}\)图和对应的透镜图。每个面板右下角的红色线段对应50角秒，中心的斜十字符号表示前景偏转体的位置。此比较显示透镜效应显著扭曲了电离泡的形态。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: A schematic diagram of using the MFP method to measure the BSD. This picture is a cartoon diagram of a two-dimensional \(x_{{{HI}}}\) map during EoR, we randomly select starting points in ionised regions of this map where \(x_{{{HI}}}\) < 0.5 (white regions) and shoot rays in random directions until the rays hit the edge of the un-ionised region (dark-coloured region, \(x_{{{HI}}}\) > 0.5) or the boundaries of map. The length of the ray’s path is used to characterise the size of the ionised region. By repeating this process, we can obtain the probability distribution of ionised regions’ size across the entire \(x_{{{HI}}}\) map.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：使用MFP方法测量BSD的示意图。此图是EoR期间二维\(x_{{{HI}}}\)图的卡通示意图，我们在此图中电离区域（\(x_{{{HI}}}\) < 0.5的白色区域）随机选择起点，并向随机方向发射射线，直到射线击中未电离区域（深色区域，\(x_{{{HI}}}\) > 0.5）的边缘或图的边界。射线路径的长度用于表征电离区域的大小。通过重复此过程，我们可以获得整个\(x_{{{HI}}}\)图上电离区域尺寸的概率分布。

title: Cosmological gravity on all scales V: MCMC forecasts combining large scale structure and CMB lensing for binned phenomenological modified gravity
summary: As cosmology rapidly approaches the data-dominated phase of stage IV large scale structure surveys, the modelling of nonlinear scales has become a serious challenge that faces the community, particularly when analysing models beyond $w$CDM. In this work, we emulate the matter power spectrum in a phenomenological parameterisation of modified gravity in which a time-varying effective gravitational constant $μ$ and a gravitational slip $η$ are binned in redshift. We are able to achieve accuracy $<1\%$ in the modified gravity boost relative to COLA (COmoving Lagrangian Acceleration) simulations. We forecast the constraining power for each bin using a simulated $3\times 2$pt LSST Y10-like data vector and a $6\times 2$pt LSST Y10 x Simons Observatory cosmic microwave background (CMB) lensing data vector. We recover the characteristic degeneracy between $μ$ and $η$ previously identified in Fisher forecasts and demonstrate that the best-constrained direction corresponds to the combination $Σ=μ(1+η)/2$ which governs the lensing potential. We show that while large scale structure is sensitive to growth of structure at low redshift, CMB lensing extends the sensitivity to a higher redshift range. These results demonstrate that fast emulation of nonlinear modified-gravity effects enables full Bayesian analyses of model-agnostic gravity parameterisations with realistic survey data vectors and astrophysical systematics.

AI.tldr: 本文开发了修正引力模型中物质功率谱的快速仿真器，用于LSST和CMB透镜联合分析，实现了<1%的精度，并展示了非线性尺度建模在宇宙学数据分析中的重要性。
AI.motivation: 随着宇宙学进入数据主导阶段，非线性尺度建模成为重大挑战，特别是在分析超越wCDM模型时。需要开发能够快速准确模拟修正引力效应的方法，以应对下一代大规模结构巡天的数据分析需求。
AI.method: 采用现象学参数化方法，将时变有效引力常数μ和引力滑移η按红移分箱。基于COLA模拟开发物质功率谱仿真器，实现<1%的精度。使用模拟的LSST Y10 3×2点数据向量和LSST Y10 x Simons Observatory CMB透镜6×2点数据向量进行约束能力预测。
AI.result: 仿真器达到<1%的精度。恢复了μ和η之间的特征简并性，发现最佳约束方向对应于控制透镜势的组合Σ=μ(1+η)/2。大尺度结构对低红移结构增长敏感，而CMB透镜将敏感性扩展到更高红移范围。
AI.conclusion: 快速仿真非线性修正引力效应使得能够使用真实巡天数据向量和天体物理系统学进行模型无关引力参数化的完整贝叶斯分析，为下一代宇宙学巡天提供了重要工具。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 随着宇宙学迅速进入第四阶段大规模结构巡天的数据主导阶段，非线性尺度的建模已成为学界面临的严峻挑战，尤其是在分析超越 $w$CDM 的模型时。在这项工作中，我们模拟了修正引力现象学参数化中的物质功率谱，其中随时间变化的有效引力常数 $μ$ 和引力滑移 $η$ 按红移分箱。我们能够实现相对于 COLA（共动拉格朗日加速）模拟的修正引力增强精度优于 $1\%$。我们使用模拟的 $3\times 2$pt LSST Y10 类数据向量和 $6\times 2$pt LSST Y10 × Simons 天文台宇宙微波背景（CMB）透镜数据向量，预测了每个分箱的约束能力。我们恢复了先前在 Fisher 预测中识别的 $μ$ 和 $η$ 之间的特征简并，并证明最佳约束方向对应于控制透镜势的组合 $Σ=μ(1+η)/2$。我们表明，虽然大尺度结构对低红移的结构增长敏感，但 CMB 透镜将敏感性扩展到更高的红移范围。这些结果表明，非线性修正引力效应的快速仿真能够使用真实巡天数据向量和天体物理系统学对模型无关的引力参数化进行完整的贝叶斯分析。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，快速仿真非线性修正引力效应使得能够使用真实巡天数据向量和天体物理系统学进行模型无关引力参数化的完整贝叶斯分析，为下一代宇宙学巡天提供了重要工具。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Posterior distributions for the cosmological and modified gravity parameters obtained from the \(3\times 2\) pt analysis of the LSST Year 10 forecast for the first three redshift bins. The vertical and horizontal dashed lines indicate the fiducial \(\Lambda\) CDM values used to generate the mock data vector. As expected, the lowest redshift bin yields the strongest constraints due to the higher signal-to-noise of the clustering and lensing observables and the larger contribution from nonlinear structure formation within the scales that we consider \(k_{cut}\leq 0.5h\,{Mpc}^{-1}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：从 LSST 第10年预测的前三个红移分箱的 \(3\times 2\) pt 分析中获得的宇宙学和修正引力参数的后验分布。垂直和水平虚线表示用于生成模拟数据向量的基准 \(\Lambda\) CDM 值。正如预期，最低红移分箱由于聚类和透镜可观测量的更高信噪比以及我们考虑的尺度内非线性结构形成的更大贡献 \(k_{cut}\leq 0.5h\,{Mpc}^{-1}\) 而产生了最强的约束。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Comparison of the posterior constraints obtained from the \(3\times 2\) pt (blue) and \(6\times 2\) pt (red) data vectors for the highest redshift bin ( \(2.15<z<3\) ). The \(6\times 2\) pt analysis additionally includes CMB lensing auto- and cross-correlations assuming Simons observatory-like survey specifications. The vertical and horizontal lines indicate the fiducial \(\Lambda\) CDM cosmology used to generate the mock data vector. The addition of CMB lensing tightens the constraint along the lensing-sensitive combination \(\Sigma=\mu(1+\eta)/2\) , reflecting the strong sensitivity of CMB lensing to the Weyl potential at high redshift.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：最高红移分箱（ \(2.15<z<3\) ）的 \(3\times 2\) pt（蓝色）和 \(6\times 2\) pt（红色）数据向量获得的后验约束比较。\(6\times 2\) pt 分析额外包括假设 Simons 天文台类巡天规格的 CMB 透镜自相关和互相关。垂直和水平线表示用于生成模拟数据向量的基准 \(\Lambda\) CDM 宇宙学。CMB 透镜的加入沿着透镜敏感组合 \(\Sigma=\mu(1+\eta)/2\) 收紧了约束，反映了 CMB 透镜对高红移 Weyl 势的强敏感性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Identical as fig. 2 but this time focusing on bin 4. We note that the gain is relatively smaller compared to the highest redshift bin (bin 5) due to the reduced sensitivity of CMB lensing to this bin.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：与图2相同，但这次聚焦于分箱4。我们注意到，与最高红移分箱（分箱5）相比，增益相对较小，这是由于 CMB 透镜对该分箱的敏感性降低。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : Principal component analysis of the \(\mu-\eta\) posterior distributions. The left panel shows the posterior samples for the lowest redshift bin obtained from the \(3\times 2\) pt analysis (red points), with the corresponding PCA eigenmodes overplotted in yellow. The right panel shows the same analysis for the highest redshift bin, comparing the \(3\times 2\) pt constraints (magenta points) with the \(6\times 2\) pt constraints that include CMB lensing (cyan points). The principal component directions for the \(3\times 2\) pt and \(6\times 2\) pt analyses are indicated by the red and yellow lines respectively. The wide eigenmode corresponds to the well-known degeneracy between \(\mu\) and \(\eta\) , while the tightly constrained direction closely aligns with the lensing-sensitive combination \(\Sigma=\mu(1+\eta)/2\) which governs the amplitude of lensing observables. Note that the black dashed line indicates the line of constant \(\Sigma\) in both panels. The inclusion of CMB lensing primarily tightens the constraint along this \(\Sigma\) direction at high redshift.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：\(\mu-\eta\) 后验分布的主成分分析。左图显示了从 \(3\times 2\) pt 分析（红点）获得的最低红移分箱的后验样本，相应的 PCA 本征模以黄色叠加。右图显示了最高红移分箱的相同分析，比较了 \(3\times 2\) pt 约束（品红点）与包含 CMB 透镜的 \(6\times 2\) pt 约束（青色点）。\(3\times 2\) pt 和 \(6\times 2\) pt 分析的主成分方向分别由红色和黄色线表示。宽本征模对应于众所周知的 \(\mu\) 和 \(\eta\) 之间的简并，而严格约束的方向与控制透镜可观测量振幅的透镜敏感组合 \(\Sigma=\mu(1+\eta)/2\) 紧密对齐。注意，黑色虚线在两个面板中都指示了恒定 \(\Sigma\) 的线。CMB 透镜的加入主要在高红移沿着这个 \(\Sigma\) 方向收紧了约束。
